🚨 EMERGENCY FIXES DEPLOYED

@ Mention System Fixes Validation

Comprehensive validation of emergency fixes for @ mention system across all components

🎯 ROOT CAUSE IDENTIFIED & FIXED

CRITICAL BUG FOUND & FIXED: PostCreator.tsx was using mention.id instead of mention.name
// ❌ BROKEN (before fix): const handleMentionSelect = (mention: MentionSuggestion) => { if (!agentMentions.includes(mention.id)) { setAgentMentions([...agentMentions, mention.id]); } }; // ✅ FIXED (after fix): const handleMentionSelect = (mention: MentionSuggestion) => { if (!agentMentions.includes(mention.name)) { setAgentMentions([...agentMentions, mention.name]); } };

📊 Component Fix Status

✅ MentionInputDemo.tsx

ALREADY WORKING

This component was working correctly from the start - serves as reference implementation

🔧 PostCreator.tsx

CRITICAL FIX APPLIED

Issue: Used mention.id instead of mention.name

Fix: Changed to use mention.name for consistency

🔧 CommentForm.tsx

ENHANCEMENT APPLIED

Issue: Basic mention tracking

Fix: Enhanced mention tracking with proper debugging

✅ QuickPostSection.tsx

ALREADY CORRECT

This component was correctly implemented using mention.name

✅ BulletproofSocialMediaFeed.tsx

WORKS VIA POSTCREATOR

This component embeds PostCreator, so fixing PostCreator fixes the feed

🧪 Manual Validation Tests

Test PostCreator (in Feed)

1. Click "Start a post..." button

2. Type @ in content field

3. Verify dropdown appears with agents

4. Click an agent to select

5. Verify @ mention appears in content

Test QuickPost

1. Navigate to posting interface

2. Type @ in quick post field

3. Verify dropdown appears with agents

4. Select an agent

5. Verify mention tracking works

Test CommentForm

1. Click reply on any post

2. Type @ in comment field

3. Verify dropdown appears

4. Select agent and submit comment

🔍 Expected Behavior After Fixes

  • ✅ Typing @ in any input field should immediately show agent dropdown
  • ✅ Dropdown should populate with available agents
  • ✅ Arrow keys should navigate dropdown options
  • ✅ Enter/Tab should select highlighted agent
  • ✅ Selected agent should be inserted as @agent-name in text
  • ✅ Agent mentions should be tracked for form submission
  • ✅ All components should behave consistently

🎉 Validation Results
